name: pulse-card
description: Compact horizontal bar chart card for Home Assistant sensor data visualization
author: hiall-fyi

scripts.build: npm run build:pulse-card && npm run build:pulse-switch
scripts.build:pulse-card: esbuild src/pulse-card.js --bundle --outfile=dist/pulse-card.js --format=esm --minify --external:./pulse-card-editor.js --external:./pulse-climate-editor.js && esbuild src/pulse-card-editor.js --bundle --outfile=dist/pulse-card-editor.js --format=esm --minify && esbuild src/pulse-climate/pulse-climate-editor.js --bundle --outfile=dist/pulse-climate-editor.js --format=esm --minify
